metadata.notes: Results from CI pipeline on dedicated benchmark runner. No other workloads.

benchmarks.name: eval_benches/single_policy_allow
benchmarks.description: Single pre-compiled Allow policy, exact tool match (index hit)

benchmarks.name: eval_benches/single_policy_deny_with_rules
benchmarks.description: Single pre-compiled Deny policy with path + domain rule checks

benchmarks.name: eval_benches/100_policies_fallthrough
benchmarks.description: 100 policies, match at ~50th (typical worst case with tool indexing)

benchmarks.name: eval_benches/1000_policies_no_match
benchmarks.description: 1000 policies, no match (full scan, default deny)

benchmarks.name: path_benches/normalize_path_simple
benchmarks.description: Normalize a simple absolute path (no encoding, no traversal)

benchmarks.name: path_benches/normalize_path_traversal
benchmarks.description: Normalize path with ../.. traversal components

benchmarks.name: path_benches/normalize_path_percent_encoded
benchmarks.description: Normalize percent-encoded path (single decode iteration)

benchmarks.name: path_benches/normalize_path_double_encoded
benchmarks.description: Normalize double-percent-encoded path (2 decode iterations)

benchmarks.name: path_benches/extract_domain
benchmarks.description: Extract domain from URL (strip scheme, port, path)

benchmarks.name: constraint_benches/regex_match
benchmarks.description: Pre-compiled regex constraint match

benchmarks.name: constraint_benches/glob_match
benchmarks.description: Pre-compiled glob constraint match

benchmarks.name: constraint_benches/wildcard_deep_scan
benchmarks.description: Recursive JSON scanning with wildcard parameter (5 levels deep)

benchmarks.name: http_proxy/call_chain_hmac/sign_verify
benchmarks.description: HMAC-SHA256 sign + verify for call-chain integrity

benchmarks.name: http_proxy/privilege_escalation/0_hops
benchmarks.description: Privilege escalation check with 0-hop chain

benchmarks.name: http_proxy/privilege_escalation/10_hops
benchmarks.description: Privilege escalation check with 10-hop chain

benchmarks.name: inspection_benches/injection_scan_clean
benchmarks.description: Aho-Corasick injection scan on clean input (no match)

benchmarks.name: inspection_benches/injection_scan_match
benchmarks.description: Aho-Corasick injection scan with match

benchmarks.name: inspection_benches/dlp_scan_clean
benchmarks.description: DLP scan on clean response (40 regex patterns, no decode layers)

benchmarks.name: audit_benches/log_entry
benchmarks.description: Log single audit entry (SHA-256 hash chain + JSONL serialize)

benchmarks.name: audit_benches/cef_format
benchmarks.description: Format single audit entry as CEF

benchmarks.name: audit_benches/redaction
benchmarks.description: Redact sensitive keys in action parameters
